name: namaste-health-system
description: Root runner for all Namaste Health System services

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd Frontend && npm install && cd ../ML-Model && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n "FRONTEND,BACKEND,ML-API" -c "cyan,magenta,yellow" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:ml"
